name: 讀心術揭露型
description: 女主內心獨白與外在表現的反差構成雙層對白。外表沉默或微笑，內心瘋狂吐槽或揭露真相，被特定角色聽到後引發劇情轉折。這種對白讓觀眾有'上帝視角'的參與感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: A year or so. That long. If he can walk in a year, I'll take his last name. This accident damaged the very core. I'm afraid without 3 to 5 years, he'll be spending it in a wheelchair... Could it be that Geneo really saved Grandpa by accident and didn't plan it all along?
